name: Datadog
description: Monitor Datadog observability configuration including active monitors, synthetic tests, and alerting setup for compliance evidence

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Datadog > Organization Settings > API Keys and copy your API Key.
2. Go to Organization Settings > Application Keys, create a key with scopes: monitors_read + synthetics_read.
3. Enter your Datadog site (e.g. datadoghq.com for US, datadoghq.eu for EU).

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Datadog > Organization Settings > API Keys

credentialFields.label: Application Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Datadog > Organization Settings > Application Keys. Requires scopes: monitors_read, synthetics_read

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that Datadog monitors are configured and actively monitoring your infrastructure

checks.name: Utility Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies that Datadog synthetic tests are configured for uptime and availability monitoring

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies that Datadog monitors have notification channels configured for alerting
